allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('submit-sale.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>\\s*<\\/body>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no inline script found'\);process.exit\(1\);}try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('JS parse OK, length:',m[1].length\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('PARSE ERR:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('submit-sale.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>\\s*<\\/body>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\('no inline script'\);process.exit\(1\);}try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\('JS parse OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('PARSE ERR:',e.message\);}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);for\(const f of ['submit-sale.html','admin-sales.html']\){const s=fs.readFileSync\(f,'utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>\\s*<\\/body>/\);if\(!m\){console.log\(f+': no inline script \(ok\)'\);continue;}try{new Function\(m[1]\);console.log\(f+': JS parse OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\(f+' PARSE ERR:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const s=fs.readFileSync\('submit-sale.html','utf8'\);const m=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>/g\);console.log\('inline scripts:',m?m.length:0\);const main=s.match\(/<script>\([\\s\\S]*?\)<\\/script>\\s*<!-- Paper/\);if\(main\){try{new Function\(main[1]\);console.log\('main JS parse OK'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('ERR:',e.message\);process.exit\(1\);}}else{console.log\('main script boundary not found \(ok if still present\)'\);}")
